feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Extended Warehouse Management
feed.subtitle: SAP Extended Warehouse Management Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to prevent creating warehouse tasks for some storage types
entry.content:
Hello Experts, I need to prevent creating warehouse tasks for some storage types by unauthorized users. 

Due to my tests, this authorization depends on the TOCR object.

However, these users still have permission to create warehouse tasks despite they do not have LGTY attributes of those storage types.

I do not have this problem in the QA system but exists in the Production system.

Waiting for your kind responses.

entry.title: Shipping to Vendor for repair and return
entry.content:
Hi,

How can we send the material to vendor for repair and return.

Currently i am using ZLO(Offline process) which does not show equipment movement in SAP and the status shows the equipment still at my plant whereas i have moved it to vendor for repair. Upon receipt of the physical equipment back to my plant, we are performing stock return process in SAP and bringing the equipment to inventory stock.

I am looking for brief transaction movement or process to move the equipment to vendor in SAP, and later need to receive it in my plant's active stock upon physical receipt from the vendor.

Couple of questions (Raised by expert):

  1. Is your Equipment also mapped to Serial Number # ? 
  2. Have you explored standard Refurbishment process means -- Order (bring serial to inventory using 262)-->Sub Con PR-- Subcon PO--Transfer Posting 541O (Ship to Vendor) tracking available in MBLB--then receive 101 back to inventory 

point 2 needs split valuation if your org do not have split valuation --you can still explore Subcon process with serial numbers --

Response for above question raised by the expert:

Yes my equipment is serialized component. Can you please elaborate the steps required as i am bit confused. Regular Purchase Requisition created against the local job order(work order) but without material number--> Regular PO  created through the same PR --> 541 movement in MIGO to ship to vendor --> Shipping the physical component to vendor through ZLO-DT/Shipment --> Receiving the physical unit back from the vendor --> Perform GR(using MB1B-101) for the PO(initially created without material number). Then the serial number will reflect in my stock location (OR) do i need to perform separate movement to bring the unit in to my stock? Please correct me if i am wrong.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Product master Standard HU type
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to understand the usage of Packing group and Standard HU type in Product master -->Packaging data.

Is this used for Inbound and Outbound packing?

The F1 help on Std HU type says "Standard HU Type for mixed HUs, where no packing instruction is used for  creating HU". Not getting what this means. 

Could someone throw some light on this?

Thanks

Bobby

entry.title: Product Master Standard HU type
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to understand the usage of Packing group and Standard HU type in Product master -->Packaging data.

Is this used for Inbound and Outbound packing?

The F1 help on Std HU type says "Describes Standard HU Type for mixed HUs, where no packing instruction is used for creating HU". I am not getting what this means.

Could someone throw some light on this?

Thanks

Bobby

entry.title: Synchronous Goods Receipt with automatic Warehouse Task Creation (Public Cloud)
entry.content:
Hi all 

I am looking for a way to do the Synchronous goods receipt posting in SAP Public Cloud and also use the Automatic Warehouse Task Creation when the Goods Receipt is Posted.

i know to use this App(image below)  for the Synchronous Goods Posting but i am unsure what to configure for the automatic warehouse task creation. But i don't know what o Configure in Configure your solution. 

 

 

 

I Set the automcatic WT Task creation to active in Maintain Storage types but it does not seem to change a thing.

entry.title: Quantity reduction in Sales Order reduces Quantity in ODO even though WPT is not active for reductio
entry.content:
Dear all,

we have the issue that a quantity reduction in the ERP Sales order reduces the Quantity in IDR and ODO even though the warehouse process type doesn't have the order reduction flag active. I debugged the entire processing and I found out that SAP doesn't even check the WPT. What's the issue here? I neither found a corresponding OSS note for it. What could possibly go wrong here? I also checked warehouse number specific customizing but also nothing found.

Thanks and best regards
Stefan

entry.title: LT0G return to multiple storage bins
entry.content: Please is there a possibility to return the material to stock after performing VL09 via LT0G but to multiple storage bins (to the same as they were issued from before) because when i do the vl09 and then LT0G it puts back the whole quantity but to the last storage bin in the screen it is not possible to select more the first one is locked and looks like it is not on 916 in LT0G (but it is)

entry.title: SAP EWM LOSC creating Product WT instead of HU WT
entry.content:
Hello,

I've configured Layout Oriented Storage Control, however when it's creating the tasks - the first task is an HU WT, but the second task is a product WT. How do I enable that both tasks are HU WT, to prevent further adhoc moves against the same HU?

Storage Type Set-up for Intermediate bin

LOSC Config

Tasks generated. Task 4888 is a product task, but there's an HU linked to it. When I try to do an adhoc move for the same HU, system allows me to.

entry.title: Specify staging method after PMR creation
entry.content:
Hello,

in a PMR we have a component that can either be picked from a silo or from a container in a pallet storage. 

When the production order is created, it is not yet known whether the component should be removed from a silo or a container, but only when it is released.

We would like to use different staging methods for both cases:

1) Silo: Not relevant for Staging

2) Container: Cross Order Staging 

How can we achieve this? Do we always need to create/change the entry in /SCWM/PSASTAGE before production order release, depending on whether the stock should be picked from the silo or container?

Or is it also possible to create the component item in the PMR initially without staging method (and goods movement bin) and to specify the staging information later? 

Thank you.

Best regards,

Julian

entry.title: /SCWM/REPL fails when creating HU WT but /SCWM/ADHU is ok
entry.content:
Dear SAP gurus:

We are having a struggle with our implementation of EWM. Let me explain the case.

We have a warehouse that's physically divided in 2 areas:

1: Full pallet area: These are a Bulk storage types, each HU has 1 material /1 batch but in the bin there can be mixed batches for the same material.

2: Pick-hu area: this is a rack storage that works with fixed bin and is replenished when the quantity goes below some stock.

In order to move the HUs from Full Pallet area to Pick-HU area, we also use LOSC as the forklifts from Full pallet area do not fit into pick-hu area and therefore they leave the HU in an intermediate Storage type.

We have set the storage type as planned replenishment, we have set the masterdata (material and packspec for warehouse process).

Stock is aligned, no inconsistencies. There is available stock to move.

If we run the REPL transaction, selecting Warehouse number and Show log settings

the system gives an error /SCWM/L3686 

Available quantity is not sufficient for HU WT

If we take one HU and move it to pick-HU area with ADHU, it works.

Note: Both WTs are now cancelled but were created following LOSC, one of them was inactive until the other was confirmed.

Have you ever had this issue? Any help would be much appreciated.

Regards

Iris

entry.title: KIT to stock process- batch determination of components at production order release
entry.content:
In the KIT to stock process, we have our batch determination of components during the release of production order, these batches are copied over to the outbound delivery and later gets distributed to EWM. 

In scenarios where the determined batch cannot be picked (could be missing material, incomplete qty, damages etc.), and a new batch needs to be picked during the OBD processing in EWM and be picked up by the WT. Is there a possibility with exception handling to handle such cases or what could be a possible solution in such cases ?

 

Thanks,

Sandeep

entry.title: Qrfc multiple entries in a single queue
entry.content:
Is it possible to add delay between execution of multiple LUW entries with a single Qrfc?

I have enabled Mass Queue for Inbound Delivery Distribution(VL06I) from ERP to EWM. Now, if I distribute 12 deliveries, i will have 12 LUW entries in my QRFC. I want to add a delay in between LUW execution. Is it possible? Let me know.

entry.title: Honeywell and S4/Hana integration
entry.content:
Hi Everyone. 

We are currently working on a project which integrates honeywell wms to SAP S4Hana , upon receiving of PO in WMS and transporting the payload to SAP, we received an error "gr exceeded" even if the open PO has the same quantity with GR quantity. Tolerance level is not acceptable since the GR and PO are exactly the same. 

has anyone experienced this? 

Thank you.

entry.title: how to customize batch quantities on handling units in RF environment
entry.content:
Hello experts

unfortunately I have problems with mix HU in inbound processes. I would like to post goods receipt of batch managed material with different batch numbers all on one HU. 

How do I customize that there could be different batch numbers within one HU.

Thank you in advance!!

entry.title: Received stock does not have inspection ID in ARM
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm running ARM process in the test system. I've created a return order and followed the return delivery.

After the stock of returned delivery has been GR and putaway to the clarification zone, I found there is no inspection ID for the stock. I'm wonder if there is something needs to be configured, thanks a lot.

Here is a help doc: Returns Logistics and Returns Stock | SAP Help Portal

But I think it's not so detail about quality management settings.

Regards,
Eric

entry.title: Combine Multiple Freight orders, which belong to one Carrier, into one Transportation unit in SAP EW
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

I am looking for a solution where  I can combine multiple freight orders, which belong to one carrier,  into one Transportation unit in EWM.

Kindly note that this is kind of a parcel scenario and due to multiple constraints, it is not possible to create one Freight order for one carrier.

Please suggest possible solution options.

Thanks in Advance!

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: where i can find Kit header item after kit creation at work center in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Hi All,

In kitting process we have created the kit at work center for HU with components, where this information is getting stored.

We can see the Kit header item in Pack work center with Kit icon (ICON_VSI). However, in which table kit information is getting stored.

entry.title: EWM Putaway Storage Section Indicator Defaulting to Incorrect Putaway Bin
entry.content: Product does not have a Fixed Bin assigned and the Putaway Storage Section Indicator is set to HTZN in EWM Product Master Data, then the assumption is the automatic warehouse task Storage Bin for Putaway should go to a Bin with the Storage Section HTZN, it does not.

entry.title: Unpack option, or unpack everything in the APP "pack outbound deliveries"
entry.content:
Hello experts.

It is not possible to use the unpack option, or unpack everything in the APP "pack outbound deliveries" app, when the work center warehouse type has mandatory HU control.

This error happens

What should I configure to be able to use HU in the work center, as this is a customer requirement?

entry.title: /scwm/adgi - Post GI - API or FM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

In SAP EWM 2022 (on-premise system), I'm developing an custom Unmanaged RAP API to automate unplanned goods issue (GI) posting. Currently, manual posting involves entering the following details:

Tcode: /n/scwm/adgi

Selection screen values:

1) Warehouse Number

2) Product

3) Storage Bin

4) GI Process: Consumption

5) unchecked checkbox: Select Scrap Stock only

Execute and Select Physical stock and pressed Post GI. 

Messages appears: Warehouse task created. 

On Refreshing, entry Disappears. 

Question:

While creating Post GI, tried checking following FM Calls. None of these FM's got triggered. 

/SCWM/STOCK_CHANGE
/SCWM/GM_POST
/SCWM/TO_CREATE

Please help with FM or standard API which will help in automating Post GI Process in SAP EWM 2022 onprem. 

Note: 

I have already checked following standard documentation.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/9832125c23154a179bfa1784cdc9577a/d6f87c227f894ba1b2c0d697189b73c4.html

https://api.sap.com/api/OP_WHSEPHYSICALSTOCKPRODUCTS_0001/overview?ReleaseInfo=2022%20FPS02

 

Regards,

Nikhil1
